items.caption: A roll of black carpet with a textured surface, laid out to display its pattern and color. the carpet appears to be a type of marine or boat carpet, as indicated by the text "foss bunk carpet 14'' wide sold by the foot black." the carpet is shown in a rolled-up state, with a portion of the carpet's surface visible, showcasing its texture and color. the background is plain white, highlighting the carpet's features.
